Why Milo exists.

"I shouldn't say, but I'm quite guilty of it."
Anonymous customer
Across every company we visit, the same story. Business teams pasting customer lists, salary data, financial models into personal ChatGPT accounts. Just to get an answer their analyst couldn't deliver in time.
Milo is ChatGPT for your business.
Without your data ever leaving the building.
Ask in your own words.
Get answers with explanations.
Not just charts. Milo tells you what changed, why, and what to do next.
Wherever your team already is.
No new tool to learn. No dashboard to log into. Milo lives in Slack and WhatsApp. It answers in the channel where the question was asked.
Slack WhatsApp Microsoft Teams Email

How Milo works.

No code. No SQL. No analysts in the loop.
01
You ask.
In your own words. In any language. From Slack, WhatsApp, the web — or your inbox.
02
Milo reasons over your data.
Connects to your warehouse, your docs, your team's Slack threads. Cross-references the qualitative context behind the numbers, not just the rows.
03
You get an answer. And an action.
An explanation, not just a chart. And if you want, Milo triggers the next step. update the CRM, post to the team, send the email.
Other tools optimise the query. Milo gives you the trust.

Here's what people ask.

Real questions. Real answers. Same afternoon, not next quarter.
Head of Risk · iGaming
"Show me players whose deposit patterns look like bonus abuse."
Milo cross-referenced 4M transactions against bonus claims, flagged 14 accounts in 90 seconds. Two were the same person under different IDs.
CMO · DTC retail
"Why did Tuesday's email convert 30% lower than Monday's?"
Milo found the subject line had run 47 characters versus the 32-character average for top performers. Switched mid-day. Recovered the cohort.
Head of Digital · Lithuanian operator
"What's our retention by acquisition channel last quarter?"
Asked it live in the board meeting. Milo answered on screen in under two minutes. The plan changed. The analyst team got two weeks back.
Case study · BetGames

Security.

Your people are already using ChatGPT with your data.
ChatGPT-for-work? Extra steps with a data leak attached.
Copilot? It just... regurgitates.
ISO 27001 SOC 2 Type II GDPR · ICO registered EU-hosted · Frankfurt + Dublin Zero retention with Anthropic Zero-trust · MFA · audit trails
Customer data never leaves your warehouse.
Milo passes natural language and column metadata. Never row content.

If Milo disappears tomorrow, your business doesn't.

For enterprise customers we offer a code-escrow agreement: a third-party escrow holds a copy of Milo's source code and configuration. If we cease operations, you receive a release and can run Milo on your own infrastructure.

It's a clause we add to the master agreement, not a separate product. Standard for the customer profile this room represents.

How the data flows.

Your data stays where it lives. Anthropic processes the question — never the rows.
